summary: A Go-based test runner and assertion engine with MCP integration, heavily augmented by AI agent-generated test suites.
concerns: High volume of auto-generated extra tests from GOrchestra agents may bloat the codebase
Potential redundancy between base tests and agent-generated extra tests
Untracked and staged files in git status indicate incomplete commit hygiene
Deeply nested agent output directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/...) cluttering the repository
suggestions: Consolidate or prune redundant agent-generated extra tests
Move GOrchestra agent artifacts to a separate workspace or .gitignore
Resolve staged/untracked files before continuing development
Focus on core runner and MCP handler stability over expanding test permutations
